title: Corn Production on Up Swing While Soybean, Cotton and Wheat Suffer, USDA Reports
summary: WASHINGTON, August 11, 2011 – As U.S. farmers are on track to produce the third largest corn crop in history, this summer’s extreme hot and dry conditions across much of the country are hindering soybean, cotton and all wheat production. This is the latest forecast, according to the Crop Production...
